examples.original:
Hi Sharmatha Ramesh,

Thanks for reaching out regarding "hello". I've received your message and will review it shortly. Let me know if you need anything else in the meantime.

Best,
Chief of Staff
examples.edited:
Hi Sharmatha Ramesh,

Thanks for reaching out regarding "room booking ". I've received your message and will review it shortly. Let me know if you need anything else in the meantime.

cheers,
Harshini

examples.original:
Hi Harshini C,

Thanks for reaching out regarding "hi". This is firmly on my radar now. I'm currently wrapping up a few priorities, but I will review this in detail and get back to you by end of day.

Best,
Chief of Staff

examples.original:
Hey 01- ABDUL RAHMAN ARSHAD AHMAD B,

Great to hear from you! I'd love to connect regarding "Meeting confirmation". Next Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon works best for my schedule. Let me know what time works for you and I'll send a calendar invite.

Cheers,
Harshini
